system.description:
Source: Anime 5E Beyonder Worlds, PDF p. 49.

Item Rank: 1. Point Cost: 4.

Rules Summary: Wrist-worn holographic tablet that provides computer systems, data recording and backup, GPS, network access, and virtual projection features for interstellar campaigns.
system.properties: Features: Computer System, Data Recording and Backup, GPS, Network Access, Virtual Projection

system.description:
Source: Anime 5E Beyonder Worlds, PDF pp. 78-79.

Item Rank: 13. Point Cost: 52.

Rules Summary: Gargantuan Myriad Alliance combat robot for Mecha Knights, balancing speed, protection, space resilience, and radiant weapon systems. It is suitable for Level 13 Mecha Knights and uses Helming checks for many piloting actions.
system.speed: Flight 300 ft./round; Ground Speed 300 ft./round; Spaceflight
system.properties: AC Bonus, Augmented Strength/Dexterity, Protected, Resilient, Tough, Radiant Beam, Radiant Sword, Conditional Ownership, Special Requirement
system.operator: Mecha Knight pilot; Helming skill for piloting actions
